prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年浙江省综合类最低录取位次分别为约25040名、32787名、23726名、31431名、23127名，整体呈现大幅波动特征，无持续单向趋势；2025年基准位次 约23127名，为近五年第二高位（位次数字最小），较2024年大幅前移约8300名；该校在浙江省招生计划近年持续小幅缩减：2021年210人、2022年207人、2023 年207人、2024年205人、2025年201人。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 合肥工业大学为教育部直属211工程、国家双一流 建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年约第80名，近年排名稳定在80–83区间，属于中上水平理工类高校；2025年高考周期声誉评价偏负面，主要因热门专业投档 线暴跌、部分专业无人报考引发关注；2026年周期延续偏负面，涉及学术不端事件；抖音综合热度排名第77位，评价为"一般"，短视频平台曝光量处于中等偏下水平，未出现明显 报考热度升温信号；第五轮学科评估中，管理科学与工程获评A级，为该校唯一A类学科，对应信息管理与信息系统、大数据管理与应用等招生专业；其余工科专 业虽未获A级评级，但计算机、电气、机械等传统工科实力在211高校中处于中上水平。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程及其自动化等专业持续高热 推荐，与该校工科优势方向高度契合，可能吸引高分考生报考；浙江省2026年普通高考考生总数约40万人，较2025年综合类29.1万人大幅增长约37.5%，竞争显著加剧；合肥工业大学位于安徽省合肥市，与浙江省地理相邻，交通便利，在浙江考生中具备一定地域吸引力；该校在浙江招生计划约200人 左右，占比较小，属省外招生规模适中水平。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次大幅波动特征、2026年招生计划持平、浙江省考生规模大幅增加约37.5%以及学校声誉偏负面等因素 ，竞争加剧是主导力量；在2025年基准位次23127名基础上，预计2026年最低录取位次小幅后移至约23427名，区间22927–23927名。

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 预测位次约23427名，区间22927–23927名。位次在区间内建议以二档中等难度专业为主攻方向，一档王牌专业（集成电路创新实验班、计算机）可作为冲刺目标，三档专业作为 稳妥保底。位次明显优于区间下限（如22927名以内）可重点冲刺一档热门工科专业；位次接近区间上限则建议以二档中后段及三档专业为主，确保录取。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for the Comprehensive category in Zhejiang Province were approximately 25040, 32787, 23726, 31431, and 23127, showing significant fluctuations without a consistent trend; the 2025 baseline ranking is approximately 23127, the second highest in the past five years (smallest ranking number), advancing by about 8300 positions compared to 2024; the university's enrollment plan in Zhejiang Province has been gradually decreasing in recent years: 210 in 2021, 207 in 2022, 207 in 2023, 205 in 2024, and 201 in 2025.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Hefei University of Technology is a 211 Project university directly under the Ministry of Education and a national Double First-Class construction university; in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, it ranks approximately 80th, with stable rankings in the 80–83 range in recent years, placing it among upper-middle-level science and engineering universities; during the 2025 college entrance examination cycle, its reputation evaluation was relatively negative, mainly due to a sharp drop in admission scores for popular majors and some majors receiving no applicants; the 2026 cycle continues with a negative tone, involving academic misconduct incidents; its comprehensive Douyin popularity ranking is 77th, with an evaluation of "average," indicating medium-to-low exposure on short video platforms and no clear signs of increased application enthusiasm; in the fifth round of discipline evaluations, Management Science and Engineering received an A grade, the only A-level discipline at the university, corresponding to enrollment majors such as Information Management and Information Systems and Big Data Management and Application; although other engineering majors did not receive A-level ratings, traditional engineering fields such as Computer Science, Electrical Engineering, and Mechanical Engineering are at an upper-middle level among 211 universities.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering and Automation continue to be highly recommended, closely aligning with the university's engineering strengths and potentially attracting high-scoring candidates; the total number of general college entrance examination candidates in Zhejiang Province in 2026 is approximately 400,000, a significant increase of about 37.5% compared to the 291,000 Comprehensive category candidates in 2025, intensifying competition; Hefei University of Technology is located in Hefei City, Anhui Province, geographically adjacent to Zhejiang Province with convenient transportation, offering some regional appeal to Zhejiang candidates; the university's enrollment plan in Zhejiang is about 200 students, a relatively small proportion, indicating a moderate scale of out-of-province enrollment.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the significant fluctuations in historical rankings, the stable enrollment plan for 2026, the substantial increase of about 37.5% in the number of candidates in Zhejiang Province, and the negative reputation of the university, intensified competition is the dominant factor; based on the 2025 baseline ranking of 23127, the minimum admission ranking for 2026 is expected to slightly shift back to approximately 23427, with a range of 22927–23927.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking approximately 23427, range 22927–23927. Candidates within the range are advised to focus on Tier 2 moderate-difficulty majors as the main direction, with Tier 1 flagship majors (Integrated Circuit Innovation Experimental Class, Computer Science) as sprint targets, and Tier 3 majors as safe backups. Candidates with rankings significantly better than the lower bound of the range (e.g., within 22927) can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 popular engineering majors; those with rankings near the upper bound of the range are advised to primarily choose Tier 2 mid-to-late and Tier 3 majors to ensure admission.
